title: Portuguese Sweet Stew
description: A traditional Portuguese stew made with sweet potatoes and a hint of sesame. Perfect for a warm and cozy evening.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add sweet potatoes, portuguese stew seasoning, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until sweet potatoes are tender.
